summary: Frontend testing completed for Personal Sessions admin page refactoring. All 38 tests passed. The page has been successfully refactored with inline accordion UI, simplified edit forms, and unified availability calendar.
seed_data_creation: None required - tested with existing 22 sessions
context_for_next_testing_agent: Personal Sessions admin page refactoring is complete and working correctly. All collapsible sections work, inline accordion pattern functions properly, simplified edit form has correct fields (no pricing/calendar/time slots), and unified availability calendar operates correctly.

features_tested.details: Title displays 'Personal Sessions (22)'
All 4 sections (Unified Availability Calendar, Element Visibility & Order, Session Testimonials, Session Questions) are collapsed by default
Tested Unified Calendar and Element Visibility sections - both expand and collapse correctly

features_tested.feature: Inline accordion - clicking session row expands edit form
features_tested.details: Session rows expand to show edit form inline, collapse button works to close

features_tested.feature: Simplified edit form - Title with style controls
features_tested.details: Title input with color picker, font family dropdown, font size, bold and italic buttons

features_tested.feature: Simplified edit form - Description with style controls
features_tested.details: Description textarea with style controls

features_tested.feature: Simplified edit form - Session Image uploader
features_tested.details: Image uploader component found
Testimonial text input found with data-testid='session-testimonial-input'
Three radio options for session mode found
Duration input field found

features_tested.feature: Simplified edit form - NO pricing fields
features_tested.details: No price_usd, offer_price, or pricing inputs found in form

features_tested.feature: Simplified edit form - NO per-session calendar
features_tested.details: No calendar grid or 'Available Dates' label in session form

features_tested.feature: Simplified edit form - NO time slots field
features_tested.details: No 'Time Slots' label in session form
Note says 'Pricing, dates, time slots & availability are managed from the Pricing Hub and the Unified Availability Calendar above.'
Save button with data-testid='save-session-btn' found
Collapse button found and working
Eye/EyeOff icon buttons found on session rows
Trash icon button found on session rows
ArrowUp and ArrowDown buttons found on session rows
Button with data-testid='add-session-btn' found and opens new session form inline
Calendar manager loads with grid, time slots, min advance days, max future months, block weekends toggle, and save button
Panel loads with Save Visibility Settings button
